title: Apple MacBook Pro 14" (M4 Pro, 24GB RAM, 512GB SSD)
description: The ultimate portable workstation for creators and developers, powered by the blazing-fast M4 Pro chip with active thermal management, 24GB of unified memory, and a stunning 14.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display.

title: Apple iPhone Air (128GB, Space Gray)
description: Ultra-slim engineering meets incredible mobile performance. The iPhone Air introduces a gorgeous paper-thin design, an advanced titanium aerospace-grade frame, and the power of the A18 processor.

title: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 Ti Gaming Build (Core i7, 32GB DDR5, 1TB SSD)
description: A high-performance pre-built desktop ready for next-generation PC gaming. Featuring the brand-new NVIDIA RTX 5060 Ti for real-time ray tracing, DLSS 4 frame generation, and liquid-cooled Intel Core i7.

title: ASUS ROG Swift OLED 27" 1440p 240Hz Gaming Monitor
description: Experience peak desktop visuals with near-instantaneous 0.03ms response times, pure OLED black levels, and a buttery smooth 240Hz refresh rate. Fully compatible with G-SYNC and high-dynamic-range HDR10.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Canceling Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones featuring two processors controlling eight microphones for unmatched noise cancellation. Includes high-resolution audio support, 30-hour battery life, and a comfortable lightweight fit.

title: Samsung 990 PRO 2TB PCIe 4.0 M.2 SSD
description: Blast through load times with blistering read and write speeds up to 7,450 MB/s. Optimized for professional workflows, 4K video editing, heavy developer environments, and high-performance PS5 storage expansion.

title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Gaming Mouse
description: Weighing just 60 grams, the Superlight 2 is co-designed with top esports athletes. Features LIGHTFORCE hybrid optical-mechanical switches, USB-C fast charging, and the advanced HERO 2 sensor for sub-micron tracking.
